'''''Skyesports Championship 3.0 ''''' is one of India's major event spanning across different game titles including Brawl Stars, Clash of Clans, BGMI and Valorant with a total prize pool of ₹55,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{Tabs dynamic|name1=Hindi|name2=English|name3=Tamil|name4=Telugu|name5=Kannada|name6=Malayalam|name7=Punjabi|name8=Bengali|This=1}} {{Tabs {{Tabs dynamic/end}} ===Format=== '''''Skyesports Championship 3.0:''' 21st August 2021 to 12th September 2021''. * '''''Qualifiers Round 1:''' 21st August 2021 to 25th August 2021'' ** '' A total of 1000 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 1 ** '' Teams to be divided into 50 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a single match'' ** '' Top 4 Teams from each group will qualify for the Qualifiers Round 2''. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 200 teams}} advance to ''Qualifiers Round 2''.
* '''''Qualifiers Round 2:''' 26th August 2021'' ** '' A total of 200 teams will play in Qualifiers Round 2'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 10 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 2 matches'' ** '' Top 2 Teams from each group will qualify for the Quarter Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 20 teams}} advance to ''Quarter Finals''.
* '''''Quarter Finals:''' 28th August 2021'' ** '' A total of 40 teams (20 Qualified from Qualifiers Round 2 + 20 Invited) will play in the Quarter Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 2 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 4 matches'' ** '' Top 4 Teams from each group will qualify for the Semi Finals''. ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 8 teams}} advance to ''Semi Finals''.
* '''''Semi Finals:''' 30th August 2021 to 4th September 2021'' ** '' A total of 24 teams (8 Qualified from Quarter Finals + 16 Invited) will play in the Semi Finals'' ** '' Teams to be divided into 4 groups''. ** '' Each team will get to play a total of 21 matches'' ** {{Bgcolortext|up|Top 18 teams from the overall standings}} advance to ''Grand Finals''.
* '''''Grand Finals:''' 6th September 2021 to 12th September 2021'' ** '' A total of 18 qualified teams will play in the Grand Finals'' ** '' Teams will get to play a total of 42 matches in a period of 7 days'' ** '' Each day will feature a total of 6 matches'' ====Matchdays==== * ''7 Matchdays: 6 Matches Each Day.'' ** '''''Map Rotation''''': ''E>>M>>E>>S>>M>>E'' ==Prize Pool== ₹ 26,00,000
